since_last: 56% of 89 AI names green; AI Applications & Data Software leads +4.97%; AI bubble risk 49 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: a mixed, rotational tape, 56% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +0.25% · BTC +0.62% · Gold +1.69% · Nasdaq100 -0.35%. 56% of 89 AI names are green — a mixed, rotational tape. AI Applications & Data Software is doing the heavy lifting at +4.97%.

cards.headline: AI Applications & Data Software leads, Chip Equipment & AI Hardware lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Applications & Data Software at +4.97%; weakest is Chip Equipment & AI Hardware at -3.46%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: NOW is the standout at +8.11%
cards.body: Leaders: NOW +8.11%, APP +7.47%, PUBM +7.21%, DV +7.19%, MGNI +6.90%. Laggards: TER -6.81%, HPE -6.46%, NXPI -6.17%, VRT -5.83%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +1.68% at $155.57
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +1.68% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 49 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 49/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
